items.headline: QQQ vs. VGT: The Best Way to Own Big Tech?
items.summary: The Invesco QQQ Trust (NASDAQ:QQQ) and the Vanguard Information Technology ETF (NYSEARCA:VGT) are often shoved into the same “own Big Tech” bucket, but they answer different questions. QQQ tracks the Nasdaq-100, a listing-based index that is growth-heavy. VGT tracks the MSCI US Investable Market Information Technology 25/50 Index, a pure GICS sector fund. That distinction ... QQQ vs. VGT: The Best Way to Own Big Tech?
